calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trang La appeared by zoom for Anthony Bedoussac (Personal Representative).

Ms. La stated that she filed the receipt for the guns that were sold, that her Client has not been confined in a prison or a facility, that he is resident of France and that her Client has never lived here. Ms. La also stated that if the Court is not inclined to grant the $25.50 cost/fee, she will waive it. The Petition for Order Approving Report of Administrator, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR A Status Hearing On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR A Status Hearing On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-30-2019 Continued To Jan-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trang La for Anthony Bedoussac.

The Court noted that the inventory and appraisal has been filed, but a petition to close the estate, or a petition for approval of a report on status of administration has not been filed. Ms. La stated that she can file a status report within two weeks. Status on close of estate is continued to January 27, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Trausch. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR A Status Hearing On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-09-2019 Continued To Dec-30-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trang La for Anthony Bedoussac (Administrator).

Ms. La stated that they are missing one thing (date of death statements from Citibank) for the inventory and appraisal, that they have a number of firearms on consignment with a Firearms Dealer, that they are still waiting for them to be sold and that they may have to abandon them. Ms. La also stated that they have asked Citibank for the statements at least three or four times. The Court stated that the parties can file the inventory and then amend it if needed. Status on close of estate is continued to December 30, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that it needs to see an inventory and appraisal, or it will suspend the Administrator.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
